title: Admin Notifications When Cross Account Copying
excerpt:
Does anyone know… 
When Cross Account copying a board/dashboard from one account to another, do all of the admin users on the originals side get an email notification that it was copied successfully or just the admin use…

posts.author: Tony_ClarityCo (Tony Quist)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone know…

When Cross Account copying a board/dashboard from one account to another, do all of the admin users on the originals side get an email notification that it was copied successfully or just the admin user who initiated the copying?

Thanks!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tony,

I haven’t noticed any from my Team when its been done (though its been a while, things could have changed). Why not email your Admins that you are testing it, and try it with a test board?

Bruce Gosk | bruce@mintconsulting.org

posts.author: Tony_ClarityCo (Tony Quist)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Bruce. We’re evaluating on behalf of a client, but we’ll end up testing it I’m sure. Just wanted to reach out here to see if there was a quick answer before doing so. Appreciate the help!
